content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "BowWow and the Timetable". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1204/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of classes. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers si and ti, which are the start and end times of the class respectively.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the maximum number of classes that can be attended.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the classes based on their end times and then select the classes greedily.

code.Python3:
import sys
n = int(input())
classes = [list(map(int, input().split())) for _ in range(n)]
classes.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
count = 1
last = classes[0][1]
for i in range(1, n):
    if classes[i][0] >= last:
        count += 1
        last = classes[i][1]
print(count)
